title: Zanzibari Emulsion with Rustic Potato Cakes
description: A hearty, comforting dish combining the flavors of Zanzibar with the simplicity of rustic potato cakes.
instructions: Grate the rustic potatoes and squeeze out excess moisture.
Mix the grated potatoes with a pinch of salt and black pepper.
Shape the potato mixture into patties.
Heat the rich olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Cook the potato cakes until golden brown on both sides.
Warm the Zanzibari emulsion in a separate pan over low heat.
Serve the potato cakes with the Zanzibari emulsion spooned over the top.
